tasks.description: Add per-try debug log capturing LSP errors, typecheck errors, lastPeltastFeedback and groundTruth
tasks.changes: After the appendFileSync(reviewFile, ...) call at the end of the try block (just before the `if (tier === 'PASS')` check), add a debug log write: create a `debug-logs` dir in stateDir, write a file named `debug-${runId}-task${task.id}-try${tryCount}.md` containing: the task description, try number, groundTruth array joined with newlines, the peltastOut string, and lastPeltastFeedback. This gives full visibility into what error signal Builder received each try. Use mkdirSync+writeFileSync wrapped in try/catch (non-fatal). The stateDir is at this.governor.config.stateDir.

tasks.description: Add hoplite output log capturing raw LLM output after stripThinking
tasks.changes: After the stripThinking(raw) call that produces the hoplite output, add a log write: create a `hoplite-logs` dir in this.governor.config.stateDir, write a file named `hoplite-${timestamp}-${file.replace(/[\/]/g,'_')}.md` containing: the instruction (first 200 chars), the target file path, and the full stripped LLM output. Use mkdirSync+writeFileSync wrapped in try/catch (non-fatal). Import mkdirSync and writeFileSync from fs if not already imported.
